text:
Q (, Kyū) is an encryption software in the Hunter × Hunter world. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 350 

Overview

By sending a nine-digit code to a phone company held by the Hunter Association, a Hunter can send and receive information via this special software. There are no logs and no call history, and regular wiretapping systems cannot detect this method of data transfer. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

After Basho, Biscuit, Hanzo, Melody, Kurapika, and Izunavi had sent their details to the six offers from Princes of the Kakin Empire, Kurapika reminds them that if their clients specified a non-disclosure agreement, they should be using Q as their method to share information between themselves. 

Trivia

Presumably the software is named Q in reference to its nine-digit code mechanics, because in Japanese "q" (キュー) and 9 (きゅう) are homophones that sound like "kyū".
